notes: All-within-threshold case. Stub returns 'continue current routine'. Live should compose an encouraging-but-not-promotional brief without inventing flaws.

Elbow flair signal at 14.5deg (threshold 10). Brief must mention elbow + the value or a corrective term. Anatomy page concept-anatomy-elbow-complex won't exist until day 3 — for day 1 stub eval, scope to existing anatomy slugs (core/glute/ankle) which is what build_form_context returns.

Follow-through droop + release-height undershot. Two flagged signals — brief should address the most consequential (the wrist follow-through controls accuracy). Tests the composer's ability to prioritize between flagged signals.
Knee-valgus safety signal — collapse on landing. Brief MUST flag injury risk and prescribe corrective drill. Tests the safety-check signal which is the brand-killer if missed.

Layup case — Phase 2 territory. Tests that the composer handles shot_type='layup' even though concept-anatomy-layup-* and layup techniques aren't in the wiki yet. build_form_context should return the layup focus (hip_flexor_complex, glute_max, ankle_complex, core_outer — all exist). Brief should still ground in available anatomy.
